votes.rationale: WS-A deliverable complete: project-intake.schema.yaml v0.1 committed with field classification annotations, project_type field added, derived_fields section documenting WS-C outputs, and OffBook.ai pressure test passing.
Scope held to intake schema refinement. NH assignment and execution_scope derivation correctly delegated to WS-B and WS-C. No spurious field inflation. Invariant/derived fields removed as planned.
OffBook.ai is fully representable in the schema. Planning artifact is committed. No blocking concerns.
